hero.description: Building scalable platforms and transforming complex data into modern software solutions.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Hybrid Profile: Development & Data
about.bio1: Systems Analysis and Development student with a solid foundation in Full-Stack architecture and Data Engineering. I have practical experience in creating SaaS systems and interactive web applications, structuring efficient ETL pipelines, and robust data modeling.
about.bio2: My focus is on building scalable platforms, automating tedious business processes, and integrating modern software solutions with the latest technologies, such as local language models (LLMs) and analytical BI visualizations.

bnb.bullet1: Working with ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipelines using SQL Server and RStudio for analytical processing.
bnb.bullet2: Developing scripts to automate the processing of large-scale databases.
bnb.bullet3: Creating and maintaining interactive dashboards in Power BI to monitor institutional performance KPIs.

freelancer.bullet1: Engineering high-fidelity, high-performance responsive interfaces using Next.js, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.
freelancer.bullet2: Building robust APIs in Node.js with secure endpoints to process business logic.
freelancer.bullet3: Advanced SEO and page load optimization through Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and Static Site Generation (SSG).

ecommerce.bullet1: Integrated end-to-end operational flow management across e-commerce platforms.
ecommerce.bullet2: Synchronized physical and virtual inventory control, minimizing stockouts.
ecommerce.bullet3: Managing and analyzing transactional databases to optimize shipping and dispatch logistics.

correai.title: CorreAI (CRM with AI)
correai.subtitle: CRM for Real Estate Agents
correai.description: An intelligent real estate lead management platform that integrates conversational chatbots based on local LLMs (Ollama) for automatic qualification and a smart engine for personalized property recommendations.

somosfisio.title: SomosFisio / VitareFisio
somosfisio.subtitle: SaaS for Physiotherapy Clinics
somosfisio.description: A Full-Stack SaaS platform for physiotherapy clinic administration. Features complete clinical management workflows, weekly appointment scheduling, electronic medical records, and visual patient rehabilitation progress tracking.

crmjuridico.title: CRM Jurídico / Advocacy System
crmjuridico.subtitle: Advocacy Management & Finance
crmjuridico.description: A platform for law firms with client tracking, detailed financial management of fees, hearing schedules, and file attachments. Integrated with the WhatsApp API.

siteadvogado.title: Lawyer Website
siteadvogado.subtitle: Professional Digital Presence
siteadvogado.description: High-conversion landing page and digital presence engineered for a law firm, featuring custom-tailored design, responsive layout, ultra-fast loading times, and accessibility compliance.

siteestetica.title: Aesthetic Clinic Website
siteestetica.subtitle: Premium Landing Page
siteestetica.description: Modern and premium aesthetic clinic landing page focused on conversion and appointment scheduling. Showcases body and facial treatments in a visually stunning layout with clean contact integrations.

contact.title: Let's
contact.infoDesc: I am open to new professional opportunities, freelance projects, and collaborations in web development and data engineering. Feel free to get in touch!
contact.waMsg: Hello Breno, I came from your portfolio!
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Hi Breno, I'd like to talk about...
contact.formSuccess: Message sent successfully! Breno will get in touch soon.
contact.formError: Error sending. Try via WhatsApp or email directly.
contact.footerBuiltWith: Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS
